steps.title: Use the sentence context
steps.content: The uncle says the hardest <u>part</u> of telling a story is finding the beginning. In this context, <u>part</u> means one component or aspect of the larger process of storytelling.

steps.title: Reject literal mismatches
steps.content: A means a physical area. B means a musical tune. D means a shapeless mass. None of those meanings fits a component of telling a story.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Element means a component or aspect of something larger, which fits the sentence. The answer is C.
